---
title: "Research"
---

## Research Interests

- Natural Language Processing
- Computer Vision
- Bayesian Methods

---

## Publications

### 2024

**My Great Paper Title**  
John Doe, Jane Smith  
*Journal of AI Research*, vol. 12, pp. 1–20  
<!-- [PDF](assets/papers/paper1.pdf) | [Code](https://github.com/...) | [DOI](#) -->

---

## Projects

### Project Alpha
<!-- ![](assets/img/project1.png)

Short description of the project, methods used, and outcomes. -->
